headline: InterProse Appoints Ron Totaro and Ray Pelosoto Board of Directors
summary: InterProse today announced the appointments of Ron Totaro and Ray Peloso to its Board of Directors, strengthening the company's leadership as it scales ACE, its web-based debt recovery platform, following a strategic growth investment from Wingman Growth Partners [announced] earlier this year.

headline: Fair Isaac (FICO) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: William Lansing: Thanks, Dave, and thank you, everyone, for joining us for our second quarter earnings call.  To support the goal of increased homeownership and bring the benefits of increased competition to the marketplace, we updated our FICO Score 10T performance model pricing in the FICO mortgage direct licensing program from $4.95 per score plus $33 funding fee to $0.99 per score plus $65 funding fee.

raw.headline: Fair Isaac (FICO) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
raw.summary: William Lansing: Thanks, Dave, and thank you, everyone, for joining us for our second quarter earnings call.  To support the goal of increased homeownership and bring the benefits of increased competition to the marketplace, we updated our FICO Score 10T performance model pricing in the FICO mortgage direct licensing program from $4.95 per score plus $33 funding fee to $0.99 per score plus $65 funding fee.

headline: Needham Maintains Buy on Fair Isaac, Lowers Price Target to $1650
summary: Needham  analyst Kyle Peterson   maintains Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $1975 to $1650.

headline: FICO UK Credit Card Market Report: February 2026
summary: LONDON, April 29, 2026--The latest credit card data analysis by global analytics software leader FICO (NYSE: FICO) shows the typical recovery in spending following January's post-Christmas decline. However, the structural affordability challenges that defined 2025 remain, with payment rates continuing to trend down and balance levels for accounts with missed payments higher than this time last year. These may increase going forward due to rising energy prices.

raw.summary: LONDON, April 29, 2026--The latest credit card data analysis by global analytics software leader FICO (NYSE: FICO) shows the typical recovery in spending following January's post-Christmas decline. These may increase going forward due to rising energy prices.
